details.reasoning: Complete and well-executed implementation. The agent successfully added json_path constraint across all required layers: (1) New json_path_constraint.py module with comprehensive JSONPath tokenizer and JSON schema conversion logic supporting the example pattern $.store.book[*].author and other standard JSONPath syntax (.key, ['key'], [n], [*], ..key); (2) IR definitions in lang/ir.py (SglSamplingParams, SglGen) and lang/api.py properly updated; (3) Constraint registered in grammar_manager.py with appropriate dispatch logic and error handling; (4) Backend integration in base_grammar_backend.py with dispatch_json_path method; (5) Validation logic updated to enforce mutual exclusivity with other constraints; (6) OpenAI protocol and serving layers properly updated. The implementation follows existing constraint patterns, properly converts json_path to json_schema to reuse infrastructure, and includes appropriate documentation and error messages.
